prose: Formaldehyde frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap calculated using DFT with B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard', density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz file (4 atoms), used in a single-point calculation without re-optimization. SCF converged in 8 cycles with no warnings. HOMO energy: −7.6523067 eV; LUMO energy: −1.7826355 eV. The reported gap of 5.8696712 eV is a Koopmans-style orbital energy difference, not an excitation energy. Calculation performed via the frontier-orbitals skill: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`.
